examples.text: يُعَدُّ ٱلْفَيْرُوسُ ٱلْمَسْؤُولُ عَنِ ٱلاِنْتِشَارِ ٱلْوَبَائِيِّ ٱلْحَالِيِّ فِي ٱلصِّينِ فَيْرُوسًا مَعْرُوفًا لِلْأَطِبَّاءِ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشُونَهُ جِدًا.
examples.english: The virus is considered responsible for the present epidemic in China, being a virus known to and feared much by the medical practitioners.

senses.gloss: the swelling or inflammation of a tendon
